modinfo "0w\xaf\f\x92t\b\x02A\xe1\xc1\a\xe6\xd6\x18\xe6path\tgithub.com/moby/moby/v2/cmd/docker-proxy\nmod\tgithub.com/moby/moby/v2\t(devel)\t\ndep\tgithub.com/containerd/log\tv0.1.0\t\ndep\tgithub.com/ishidawataru/sctp\tv0.0.0-20251114114122-19ddcbc6aae2\t\ndep\tgithub.com/sirupsen/logrus\tv1.9.3\t\ndep\tgolang.org/x/net\tv0.47.0\t\ndep\tgolang.org/x/sys\tv0.38.0\t\nbuild\t-buildmode=pie\nbuild\t-compiler=gc\nbuild\t-ldflags=\"-w -X \\\"github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.Version=29.1.3\\\" -X \\\"github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.GitCommit=fbf3ed25f893e6ce21336f1101590e40a13934f4\\\" -X \\\"github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.BuildTime=2026-06-01T01:22:37.000000000+00:00\\\" -X \\\"github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.PlatformName=\\\" -X \\\"github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.ProductName=\\\" -X \\\"github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.DefaultProductLicense=\\\"   \"\nbuild\t-tags=exclude_graphdriver_btrfs,seccomp\nbuild\tDefaultGODEBUG=containermaxprocs=0,cryptocustomrand=1,decoratemappings=0,tlssecpmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,urlstrictcolons=0,x509sha256skid=0\nbuild\tCGO_ENABLED=1\nbuild\tCGO_CFLAGS=\"-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -fomit-frame-pointer -pipe -flto=auto -I/usr/include\"\nbuild\tCGO_CPPFLAGS=\nbuild\tCGO_CXXFLAGS=\"-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -fomit-frame-pointer -pipe -flto=auto\"\nbuild\tCGO_LDFLAGS=\"-Wl,-O1 -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -L/usr/lib64\"\nbuild\tGOARCH=amd64\nbuild\tGOEXPERIMENT=nodwarf5\nbuild\tGOOS=linux\nbuild\tGOAMD64=v1\n\xf92C1\x86\x18 r\x00\x82B\x10A\x16\xd8\xf2"
EOF
mkdir -p $WORK/b001/exe/
cd .
GOROOT='/usr/lib/go' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=containermaxprocs=0,cryptocustomrand=1,decoratemappings=0,tlssecpmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,urlstrictcolons=0,x509sha256skid=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=5NZibuQLdMi3427lTBMI/8sTX8xiQLWi1M_cuHEwK/NONwuh6Nib1ERhmKcpn-/5NZibuQLdMi3427lTBMI -w -X github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.Version=29.1.3 -X github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.GitCommit=fbf3ed25f893e6ce21336f1101590e40a13934f4 -X github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.BuildTime=2026-06-01T01:22:37.000000000+00:00 -X github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.PlatformName= -X github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.ProductName= -X github.com/moby/moby/v2/dockerversion.DefaultProductLicense= -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p bundles/dynbinary-daemon/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out bundles/dynbinary-daemon/docker-proxy
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
Created binary: bundles/dynbinary-daemon/docker-proxy

make -j2 
mkdir man8
/usr/bin/go-md2man -in dockerd.8.md -out man8/dockerd.8
>>> Source compiled.

>>> Install app-containers/docker-29.1.3-r1 into /var/tmp/portage/app-containers/docker-29.1.3-r1/image

  [ ok ]
  [ ok ]
 * 
 * To use Docker, the Docker daemon must be running as root. To automatically
 * start the Docker daemon at boot:
 *   rc-update add docker default
 * 
 * To use Docker as a non-root user, add yourself to the 'docker' group:
 *   usermod -aG docker <youruser>
 * 
 * Install additional packages for optional runtime features:
 *   sys-apps/rootlesskit for rootless mode support
 * for rootless mode you also need a network stack
 *   app-containers/slirp4netns for rootless mode network stack
